name: Bi Chen
page_title: Bi Chen 畢諶 [Wei, Zhang Miao, Lu Bu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: When Cao Cao was Governor of Yanzhou, Bi Chen of Donghai was his Aide-de-camp. At Zhang Miao’s rebellion, Bi Chen’s family were abducted, because of this, Cao Cao urged Bi to leave, saying: “Your elderly mother is with Zhang Miao, you can go.” Bi Chen showed obeisance and declared his loyalty, moving Cao Cao to tears.. As soon as Bi Chen left the tent, he went to Zhang Miao. At the fall of Lü Bu, Bi Chen was captured alive. The host feared for him but Cao Cao said: “A person is filially pious to his parents, will also be loyal to his lord! This is the man for whom I have been searching.” And then he made Bi Chancellor of Luguo.

sections.short-biography: Aide to Cao Cao, his family was captured and he left only to be captured later.

full_text:
Bi Chen 畢諶
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bi Chen (畢諶)was born in Dongping commandery. Aide to Cao Cao, his family was captured and he left only to be captured later. Bi Chen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom, Zhang Miao, and Lu Bu.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
When Cao Cao was Governor of Yanzhou, Bi Chen of Donghai was his Aide-de-camp. At Zhang Miao’s rebellion, Bi Chen’s family were abducted, because of this, Cao Cao urged Bi to leave, saying: “Your elderly mother is with Zhang Miao, you can go.” Bi Chen showed obeisance and declared his loyalty, moving Cao Cao to tears.. As soon as Bi Chen left the tent, he went to Zhang Miao. At the fall of Lü Bu, Bi Chen was captured alive. The host feared for him but Cao Cao said: “A person is filially pious to his parents, will also be loyal to his lord! This is the man for whom I have been searching.” And then he made Bi Chancellor of Luguo.
